title: Summary: Turn 989
content: Created 4 unit test files (NotionExtractionSupportTest, RawContentMediaTextExtractionServiceTest, HeuristicTextKnowledgeExtractionServiceTest, JsonFileKnowledgeBaseStoreTest) covering 45 tests for the knowledge services, and fixed a pre-existing IOException in ObsidianExportCommand; remaining compile errors in JsonFileKnowledgeBaseStoreTest (Snapshot import, RelationType enum) and two InferenceConfig constructor mismatches in KnowledgeBaseTest need resolution before running tests.
